title: Backcountry Film Festival and Fundraiser for F-CNFAIC and AAS!!
summary: Winter Wildlands Alliance's 10th Annual Film Festival will be held January 23rd at APU's Grant Hall. Join the Alaska Avalanche School and Friends of the Chugach National Forest Avalanche Center for a night of great entertainment, raffle prizes, and a chance to rekindle your winter stoke!! Click link...
